name: Subsurface Conduit
oracle_text:
When ~ enters, overclock. (Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them until end of turn.)
You may cast instant and sorcery cards you exiled with this ability until end of your next turn.
flavor_text: The deeper shafts pulse with something older than civilization. I can feel it calling—and when I listen, knowledge floods in.

validation_errors: Oracle text contains what looks like reminder text: "(Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play them until end of turn.)"
Combined oracle + flavor text is 356 characters, exceeding the 350-char limit for this card type

art_prompt: A lean, dark-haired human rogue in sleek tactical gear crouches in a deep underground shaft, fingers splayed against ancient stone walls that glow with faint bioluminescent veins. Their expression shows intense focus as ethereal knowledge-streams flow visibly around them, suggesting communion with something vast and primordial beneath the earth.. Stylized digital illustration, geometric composition, cool steel-blue and teal palette, screen-glow lighting, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: UB signpost uncommon for Deep Descent archetype. Overclock exiles three cards and allows playing them until end of turn (including lands). The second ability specifically grants an extended window for instant/sorcery cards until end of next turn via 'this ability' phrasing, supporting recursive casting patterns and mill synergy. The 2/2 body is efficient at uncommon. Temporal windows are now explicit: all cards have an initial window (EOT), instants/sorceries have an extended window (end of next turn). Flavor emphasizes alien knowledge of the Anomalous Subsurface.
